---
applyTo: "notes/**/*.Rmd,notes/_bookdown.yml,notes/_output.yml,notes/**/*.css,notes/**/*.tex"
---

# Notes Instructions

- Treat `notes/index.Rmd` as the bookdown entrypoint.
- Preserve chapter ordering, cross references, and bookdown configuration.
- Keep note prose aligned with code and equations.
- Avoid changes that would break CSS, TeX includes, or bookdown output formats.
